  "findings": [
    "Missing required cleanout on the trap or drainage piping, violating plumbing code requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the affected line, cut into the drainage piping, and install a code-compliant cleanout fitting with proper clearance."
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of a required cleanout on a trap or drainage line violates both the International Plumbing Code (IPC) and Uniform Plumbing Code (UPC). Cleanouts are mandatory for maintenance and clearing blockages. Because the system is already in service, this missing component represents a non-compliant installation that must be failed and remediated.",
  "references": [
    "IPC Section 708 (Cleanouts)",
    "UPC Chapter 7 (Sanitary Drainage - Cleanouts)"
  ]
}
